query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM newsletter_subscribers;
SELECT source, COUNT(*) as count FROM newsletter_subscribers GROUP BY source ORDER BY count DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2SwVK5NjsaUvPbw.root --database dwDnV2Lj8n7Vbu7KdvRPoj --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM newsletter_subscribers;
SELECT source, COUNT(*) as count FROM newsletter_subscribers GROUP BY source ORDER BY count DESC;
